session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment{suffix}.

ai.quota: AI usage limit reached. Please try again in 1–2 minutes.
ai.auth: AI service authentication error. Please contact the administrator.
ai.transient: Temporary AI service error. Please try again shortly.
ai.unknown: AI response failed. Please try again shortly.

github.connect_required: GitHub connection required. Connect your GitHub account on the Profile page and try again.
github.not_found: Repository or file not found. It may be a private repository you don't have access to (check your GitHub connection in Profile).

job.not_found: The job could not be found or has expired.
job.forbidden: This job belongs to another user.
job.timeout: The job didn't finish in time. Please try again shortly.

concurrency_limit: You already have work in progress. Please try again once it finishes.
